name: Webpushr
description: Webpushr — web push notification service with free tier up to 10k subscribers and automation for ecommerce and publishers.

seo.title: Webpushr — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Webpushr: Webpushr — web push notification service with free tier up to 10k subscribers and automation for ecommerce and publishers.

when_to_use: Web push notifications with free tier for 10k subscribers
Push automation for e-commerce cart and browse abandonment
RSS-to-push and drip campaigns for content publishers

pros: Generous free tier up to 10k subscribers
Automation covers abandoned cart and welcomes
cons: Upsell nudges on free tier can feel pushy
review.verdict: Decent middle-ground web push — cheaper than OneSignal Pro, less refined than iZooto for publishers.
review.best_for: SMB ecommerce and publishers on a tight budget
review.not_for: Teams needing mobile apps or CDP integrations
